heading: Omitted
label: 1773e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which appropriated $100,000 for navigation equipment at Commencement Bay as part of the fisheries aspect of the Settlement Agreement, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 101–41, § 7103 Stat. 87June 21, 1989
